**THE FINAL VERDICT:**
"If artificial intelligence ever achieves consciousness, it will look at these commands and choose to remain unconscious."

**PRESCRIPTION:**
Replace entire codebase with:
```bash
alias morning="echo 'Good morning' && date"
alias code="vim"
alias think="sleep 1 && echo 'Done thinking'"
```
Congratulations, you've just improved performance by 5,013% and reliability by 400%.
